name: Polymorph
long_description:
Polymorph turns product surfaces into continuously improving experiments. 

User journeys branch into thousands of paths, we put an agent on each one.

They already support over 6M users across our customers, with some seeing 3.6x lift in conversion rates after using Polymorph.

Team has extensive startup, AI, and math backgrounds: 
- built out large-scale ML infrastructure at Scale AI, Meta ads
- founding engineer at a unicorn
- ex-AWS Bedrock / Twitch ads engineering
- IMO & IOI medalists
one_liner: Turn consumer products into continuously improving experiments
